**Example 1: 创建hive自定义源**



Input: 

```
tccli wedata CreateDataSource --cli-unfold-argument  \
    --ProjectId 2917455276892352512 \
    --Name hive_2 \
    --Type HIVE \
    --ProdConProperties {"version":"3.1.3","deployType":"CONNSTR_CVMDB","url":"jdbc:hive2://***.**.0.41:7001/default;principal=hadoop/172.31.0.41@EMR-9IF1ACKS","username":"hadoop","password":"***********","region":"ap-guangzhou","vpcId":"vpc-f7x3tgyr","hiveMetastoreUris":"thrift://***.**.0.33:7004,thrift://***.**.0.41:7004","authentication":"Kerberos","principal":"test@EMR-9IF1ACKS","isMetaDB":true,"isUseZk":true,"zkUrl":"jdbc:hive2://***.**.0.103:2181,***.**.0.123:2181,***.**.0.113:2181/default;serviceDiscoveryMode=zooKeeper;zooKeeperNamespace=hiveserver2;principal=hadoop/***.**.0.41@EMR-********","metaParam":"{\"ip\":\"***.**.0.76\",\"port\":\"3306\",\"db\":\"hivemetastore\",\"username\":\"root\",\"password\":\"***********\",\"type\":\"mysql\"}"} \
    --ProdFileUpload.CoreSite data:text/xml;base64,PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIiBlbmNvZGluZz0iVVRGLTgiPz4KPD94bWwtc3R5bGVzaGVldCB0eXBlPSJ0ZXh0L3hzbCIgaHJlZj0iY29uZmlndXJhdGlvbi54c2wiPz4KCjxjb25maWd1cmF0aW9uPgoKICAgIDxwcm9wZXJ0eT4KICAgICAgICA8bmFtZT5kZWxlZ2F0aW9uLnRva2VuLmlkZW***********************gogICAgICAgIDxuYW1lPmZzLkFic3RyYWN0RmlsZV*5c3RlbS5vZnMuaW1wbDwvbmFtZT4KICA*ICAgIC*8***ZpZGVyPC92YWx1ZT4KICAgIDwvcHJvcGVydHk+CgogICAgPHByb3BlcnR5Pgog*CAgICAgIDxuYW1lPmZzLmNvc24uZW1ydjIuaW5zdGFuY2UucHJvdmlkZX*uZW5hYmxlZDwvbmFtZT4*IC******ICA*ICA8bmFtZT5mcy5jb3NuLnRyc2*****Fs*WU+MTQ0MDwvdmFsdWU+CiA*****uY*9t*H**** \

```

Output: 
```
{
    "Response": {
        "Data": {
            "DataSourceId": 74380,
            "Status": true
        },
        "RequestId": "786fff75-ff05-4662-a0c9-6a62556b3491"
    }
}
```

**Example 2: 创建数据源**



Input: 

```
tccli wedata CreateDataSource --cli-unfold-argument  \
    --ProjectId 1460947878944567296 \
    --Name mysql_2 \
    --Type MYSQL \
    --ProdConProperties {"deployType":"CONNSTR_CVMDB","url":"jdbc:mysql://1.1.1.1:1111/database","username":"aaaa","password":"aaaa","region":"ap-guangzhou","vpcId":"vpc-ds5rpnxh"}
```

Output: 
```
{
    "Response": {
        "Data": {
            "DataSourceId": 62268,
            "Status": true
        },
        "RequestId": "0cc0b81f-feb4-4d56-acd5-7ea989e35ae4"
    }
}
```
